diagrams.title: Hard vs Soft Real-Time Systems
diagrams.description: Comparison showing tolerance for missed deadlines
elements: Hard real-time: failure zone after deadline
Soft real-time: degradation zone after deadline
diagrams.purpose: Understanding critical difference in real-time constraints

diagrams.title: Symmetric Multiprocessing Architecture
diagrams.description: SMP model showing multiple CPUs sharing common memory
elements: OS Kernel running on all CPUs
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how SMP distributes work equally among processors

diagrams.title: Asymmetric Multiprocessing Architecture
diagrams.description: AMP model showing master-slave processor relationship
elements: Master controls all resources and assigns tasks
diagrams.purpose: Understanding hierarchical processor relationship in AMP

diagrams.title: RTOS Task States
diagrams.description: State diagram showing task lifecycle in RTOS
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how RTOS manages task execution and scheduling

diagrams.title: Priority Inversion Problem
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how priority inversion occurs in real-time systems
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the priority inversion problem and its solution needs
